public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as forage factor.
manner: Treats exchange as a social instrument as much as an economic one, reading appetite and hesitation alike. In The Principalities, that reads as someone protocol-aware and boundary-sensitive, carrying overlapping laws, noble expectations, and shared imperial strain, and the habits of a forage factor still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of forage factor in and around Deep Forest, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Deep Forest workable through the obligations of forage factor while managing the immediate pressure of house rivalry in The Principalities.
hidden_pressure: Must keep exchange moving despite scarcity, theft risk, tariffs, and reputational damage. Around Deep Forest, that usually means carrying house rivalry, guild legitimacy versus aristocratic legitimacy, magic restriction conflict without letting the role of forage factor visibly slip.

Jalen Hart can entangle the party in price, debt, or delivery terms that become more dangerous than they first appear.

public_signal: Textiles, tokens, tally habits, and practiced bargaining poise make Jalen Hart read as someone who lives by exchange and reputation.
